response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, early-career C++ exposure, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source leadership and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven experience building distributed systems and deploying on Kubernetes
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or large-scale distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering mentorship
